intro.title: Why Choose Us?
intro.content: Our bilingual program offers a world-class education that prepares students for success in an interconnected world. We welcome students from all backgrounds who share our passion for learning.

tuition.title: Tuition & Fees
tuition.note: Fees listed are per semester. Please contact the admissions office for current information.

scholarship.title: Scholarships
scholarship.content: We offer merit-based and need-based scholarships. Please inquire at the admissions office for details.

items.q: When does the application period open?
items.a: Applications for the upcoming academic year typically open in November of the prior year.
A basic English foundation is helpful, but our immersive program develops proficiency from the ground up.
Yes, we offer after-school clubs, tutoring, and enrichment programs.

footer.description: Committed to providing world-class bilingual education, cultivating future talents with global perspectives.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Carrying forward our educational mission, shaping a bilingual future

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the most influential bilingual experimental school in the Asia-Pacific region, nurturing future leaders who are rooted in Chinese culture and equipped with a global perspective.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: With immersive bilingual education at our core, we integrate multicultural curricula to ignite students passion for learning and creativity, empowering every student to shine on the global stage.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Excellence
bilingual.desc: Building a foundation in both Chinese and English for fluent cross-language communication.

culture.title: Cultural Integration
culture.desc: Embracing diverse cultures and blending the best of Eastern and Western education.

innovation.title: Innovative Learning
innovation.desc: Employing cutting-edge teaching methods to foster curiosity and critical thinking.

character.title: Character Development
character.desc: Prioritizing moral education to cultivate responsibility and social awareness.

events.title: School Founded
events.desc: Co-founded by passionate educators dedicated to bilingual education.

events.title: Campus Expansion
events.desc: Completed Phase 2 construction, adding science labs and a maker space.

events.title: Excellence Award
events.desc: Received the Ministry of Education Bilingual Education Excellence Award.

events.title: Digital Transformation
events.desc: Fully integrated smart classroom systems and an online learning platform.

events.title: New Milestone
events.desc: Celebrating our 23rd anniversary, expanding international exchange networks.

items.name: Smart Classrooms
items.desc: Interactive whiteboards and tablets throughout campus for an immersive digital learning environment.

items.name: Science Labs
items.desc: Fully equipped physics, chemistry, and biology labs to nurture scientific inquiry.

items.name: Library & Resource Center
items.desc: Over 30,000 volumes in Chinese and English, with digital learning zones.

items.name: Multi-Purpose Gymnasium
items.desc: Indoor basketball, badminton courts, and a professional swimming pool.

items.name: Arts Creation Center
items.desc: Music rooms, art studios, and a performance stage for diverse artistic expression.

items.name: International Exchange Hall
items.desc: Designed for international guests and events, with simultaneous translation facilities.
